channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Urgent pavement obstruction near 2A Shipka Road, 11th July
item.description:
Urgent access issue: This brown waste bin has been left on the pavement for approximately one month and is obstructing pedestrian access. It presents a particular hazard for wheelchair users, childreb, visually impaired people, and parents with pushchairs, who may be forced closer to the road. Please arrange its immediate removal.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Shipka Road, Balham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish bags and green waste bin, 11th July
item.description:
As above plus rubbish thrown along grass verge

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Hornbeam Lane, Barnehurst, Bexleyheath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damaged curb with lose stones, 11th July
item.description:
A number of stones from the curb have been loosened and are sticking up.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 96, Church Road, Upper Norwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Four green bags, 11th July
item.description:
Fly tip four green bags one white cardboard box
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Broom Avenue, St Paul's Cray, Orpington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bromley common closed due to roadworks, 11th July
item.description:
How long do you envisage this road to be closed please ? Thankyou
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bromley Common, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flyposting needs removing here please, 11th July
item.description:
.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Court Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti- including swear words - on toddler play area, 11th July
item.description:
Graffiti- including swear words - on toddler play area

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Frederick Terrace, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: This road has been blocked off for ages, 11th July
item.description:
You are planning to shut Walsingham road which will mean all traffic from st pauls cray going via Broomwood road and the dreaded McDonald's- chaos is going to ensue ! Can we have Leesons Hill open BEFORE Walsingham closes ?
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1, Leesons Hill, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overgrown bushes, 11th July
item.description:
Not sure if the bushes/shrubs have even been cut this year, badly overgrown also badly overgrown ivy. This is also a great place for the druggies to hide, not nice when you come out of your house and they are sitting in there!

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Windmill Close, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog walker repeatedly letting dog foul on drive, 11th July
item.description:
This dog walker (I have video now) repeatedly lets his dog foul on my drive and walks off (ahead of his dog). This has been a constant thing leading me to set up the CCTV and now i have a video

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Westmoreland Avenue, Falconwood, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large box fly tipped, 11th July
item.description:
Large box dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 22A,22B,22C,22D, Sholden Gardens, Poverest, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish, 11th July
item.description:
This house is always taken rubbish outside the door even when they know recolection is not coming today

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chart Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Green waste, 11th July
item.description:
Green waste

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 1-7, Hoyland Close, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Sheds with no locks, 11th July
item.description:
Shed no.1 is being used by the local druggies because it has no lock

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Windmill Close, Bermondsey, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned River Bike, 11th July
item.description:
NB unavailable ebike type I. Selections.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 65, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerous parking lime bike, 11th July
item.description:
Bike blocking pavement .Happens repeatedly .People straining to move bikes so disabled and mums with prams can use the pavement.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 27, Oglander Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: DIY waste & old wooden chair dumped in alley at rear of the shops., 11th July
item.description:
I household items & DIY waste gets dumped In the alley at rear of the shops & leaving it there just encourages more fly tipping. This is annoying.& a nuisance.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 180-182, Clevedon Road, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dog waste on Tabard Street, 11th July
item.description:
There is dog waste next to the planters on Tabard Street. It has been there for three days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Tabard Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter on Tabard street, 11th July
item.description:
There is cigarettes butts, food packaging, plastic bottle in the yellow planters and on the pavement. It has been there for four days.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 28-52, Pilgrimage Street, The Borough, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: South west corner of Gayton Road and Willow Road, 11th July
item.description:
Uneven pavement tiles pose a trip hazard. Tiles sticking out got worse after completion of works to the junction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gayton Road, Belsize Park, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
